title: Compact UI
description: Scales down the viewmodel and tweaks the UI so it looks nicer on your screen!
body:
# Notice

**I've started doing Minecraft comissions in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Ce6Vty6khA)!**

# Compact UI

## About
Tired of oversized item/block models and obstructive overlays taking so much space on your screen? This pack fixes that by scaling down models, increasing transparency, and removing unnecessary visuals entirely. Feel free to check out the gallery page!

## Additional Tweaks
I recommend using the [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) mod to get rid of the transparent lines issue on item models.

## Notes
- Feel free to use this resource pack anywhere, but credit would be appreciated!
